name: swatchbook-reference
description: DTCG 2025.10 native resolver. Flat token paths organized per `$type` — color, size/space/radius, font, typography, motion, border, shadow, gradient, stroke, number — plus three independent modifiers: `mode` (light/dark baseline), `brand` (default/Brand A accent), and `contrast` (normal/high border + focus emphasis).

brand.description: Accent palette. `Default` leaves the baseline alone; `Brand A` overrides the accent scale.

contrast.description: Border + focus emphasis. `Normal` leaves the baseline alone; `High` thickens borders and boosts the focus ring.
